title: Horizontal Privilege Escalation (IDOR) on User Profiles

steps.message: Query Splunk for all requests to /user/profile/ from the suspicious session ID to identify the scope of ID probing.

params.query: index=web_logs uri_path="/user/profile/*" | stats count by client_ip, uri_path

steps.message: Perform code review of the profile controller. Ensure the application validates that the requested ID (5001) belongs to the authenticated user's session context rather than relying on the client-supplied ID.
Approve the temporary suspension of User A's account while forensic analysis of horizontal privilege escalation attempts is completed.
Deploy a mitigation filter to the WAF to block sequential ID patterns in the /user/profile/ path.
Review accessed data logs to determine if Personal Identifiable Information (PII) was exposed to User A, requiring GDPR/regulatory notification.
